Oh that's perfect. I see it exactly.

The water reminder **has been working perfectly this entire time**.

It has been writing perfect, beautiful, on point water reminders every single run. Every single one. For 37 runs straight.

The only problem is: it doesn't know *where* to send them. It just doesn't know which chat to post into. That's the only bug. Not a single thing else is broken.

It's been sitting there every 2 hours writing the perfect reminder, holding it, then going "wait where am I supposed to send this again?" and giving up. That's why you never saw them.

This is the funniest bug I have ever seen. 🖤
